riven-v1.0.0.description: _A modern recreation of the classic first-person puzzle adventure originally developed by Cyan_ **Randomizer Features** - Experience the world of Riven in a sequence-broken way. Every seed offers highly unique routing. - 2 goals to choose from: - `Good Ending`: The full Riven experience: Trap Gehn, free Catherine and open the Star Fissure. 147 locations. - `Star Fissure`: A more streamlined experience with no need to visit Tay or Age 233: Simply open the Star Fissure. 133 locations. - Randomized puzzle solutions are obtainable (and logically expected!) as items, allowing for puzzles to be solved much earlier and without having visited as much of the world - The solution for the Star Fissure Telescope is progressive and split into 10 parts, each part reveals the next Rivenese numeral in the sequence - Ability to select your starting movement speed and optionally add progressive movement speed upgrades in the item pool - Seven unique traps to experience with configurable weights and durations - On the shorter side: Solo seeds generally take 2-3 hours - Custom client UI displaying unlocked puzzle solutions alongside a compact reference sheet - No manual mod installation required! The Archipelago client hooks into the game at runtime. Nothing else to download, install, or configure. - Feature-complete and considered stable **Locations** - Visiting Key Areas - Inspecting World Objects - Interacting with World Objects - Reading Books - Solving Puzzles **Items** - Door / Lever / Crank / Button / Object Unlocks - Bridge / Platform Extensions - Maglev Throttle Levers - Starry Expanse Destinations - Randomized Puzzle Solutions **Setup Guide:** [Here](https://github.com/SerpentAI/Archipelago/blob/riven/worlds/riven/docs/setup_en.md)
riven-v1.0.0.title: Riven - 1.0.0
